report.summary: EOD v17 cycle-close (Mar 16): Quiet cycle — no new commits, git index.lock persists 5+ hours (since 13:06). Working tree grew to 472 files (up from 468). PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated to 2 new items (story-protocol-ip-guide + aster-chain-guide). 8 recently modified pages all structurally valid. TS errors steady at 42 (2 files). Rate limiter 0/6 — 13th consecutive flag. FOMC T-2.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: No new commits since last cycle — latest remains cb65a9d (Day 42 publish). All work trapped by git index.lock.

8 recently modified pages verified: ecosystem/curve, ecosystem/compound, learn/ai-depin-crypto-guide, learn/aster-chain-guide, learn/crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026, learn/chain-abstraction-guide-2026, learn/morpho-protocol-guide, learn/story-protocol-ip-guide — all have valid page.tsx with proper imports.
PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated since v16: was stablechains + crypto-index-funds, now story-protocol-ip-guide + aster-chain-guide (2 items).
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 368 raw slugs, ~102 slugs missing page.tsx (~28%) — persistent carry-over concentrated in /learn, /taxes, /wallets, /investing/best, /blog.
TypeScript: 42 errors across 2 files — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file), 2 in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
No new regressions detected this cycle.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, 60s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=60, stale cache fallback present. No rate limiter.
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me FNG, 600s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=600. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + FNG aggregated, 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled. No rate limiter.
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300, full FALLBACK_DATA present. No rate limiter.
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama via lib/defillama, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL), s-maxage=300. No fallback, returns 500 on error. No rate limiter.

PERSISTENT FLAG: checkRateLimit() still NOT applied to any of the 6 public API routes (only in /api/cache-stats and /api/health). 13th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC Wed Mar 18 (T-2) — traffic spike risk on unprotected endpoints.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Vercel deployment: Last deploy from Day 42 publish (cb65a9d). No new commits — no new deploy triggered.
Next.js config stable: output standalone, ignoreBuildErrors true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency 4, workerThreads false.
git index.lock persists (created Mar 16 13:06, 5+ hours) — blocking ALL commits. 472 modified/untracked files in working tree (up from 468 in v16). Critical operational bottleneck continuing to grow.
Security headers and static asset caching configured correctly in middleware (127 lines).
next lint still misconfigured — 'Invalid project directory' error. Non-blocking for Vercel builds.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing committed or deployed — git index.lock blocking all progress.
DELTA SINCE v16: Working tree grew by 4 files (468→472). PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated from stablechains+crypto-index-funds to story-protocol-ip-guide+aster-chain-guide. All else unchanged.

CARRY-OVER: (1) Remove git index.lock to unblock commits. (2) Apply checkRateLimit to 6 public API routes (13 cycles overdue). (3) Rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx to fix 40/42 TS errors. (4) Fix next lint config. (5) Add fallback data to fear-greed, trending, defi-yields.

BLOCKER FOR JEFE: git index.lock (created 13:06 today) must be removed before ANY work can be committed. Run: rm .git/index.lock. This is the single biggest bottleneck — everything else is downstream of it.
